sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT, event_date DATE);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_date) VALUES (1, date '2027-03-22');
SELECT id, event_date, decade(event_date) AS decade_number FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = date '2030-05-15' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, event_date, decade(event_date) AS decade_number FROM test_dates WHERE decade(event_date) > 2020;
